question: Will the candidate out-raise their opponent this reporting period?

requirements.claim_or_quantity: Compare the total monetary amount raised by the candidate (from all sources) to the total raised by the opponent over the reporting period; if candidate > opponent, outcome is 'yes', else 'no'.
requirements.why_relevant: the terminal outcome standing as of the question date sets the base rate
high-sensitivity latent (0.90) driving the outcome distribution
high-sensitivity latent (0.80) driving the outcome distribution
high-sensitivity latent (0.80) driving the outcome distribution
a fact that reweights competing structural hypotheses materially changes the outcome
a fact that reweights competing structural hypotheses materially changes the outcome
institutional rules determine which actions are feasible and when the outcome resolves
institutional rules determine which actions are feasible and when the outcome resolves

retrieval_plan.terms: candidate raise opponent reporting period candidate opponent

retrieval_traces.logical_query: candidate raise opponent reporting period candidate opponent after:2023-02-01 before:2023-07-01
